SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
